name: crumbles
description: Smart rolling cleanup for browsing history, cookies, and site data. Keeps what you use, clears what you don't.

scripts.check:firefox: bun run build:firefox && bun run lint:firefox
scripts.package:firefox: rm -rf dist/firefox && bun run build:firefox && (cd dist/firefox && zip -qr -FS ../crumbles.zip .)
scripts.package:source: mkdir -p dist && git archive --format=zip --prefix=crumbles/ HEAD -o dist/crumbles-source.zip
scripts.package: bun run package:firefox && bun run package:source
